# Workers Comp Insurance — Contractors Choice Agency

> Workers compensation insurance quotes for Arizona contractors in 15 minutes — roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, carpentry and more. Contractors Choice Agency in Chandler, AZ.

Contractors Choice Agency provides workers' compensation insurance for contractors and trade businesses throughout Arizona and all 50 states. We specialize in fast, flexible coverage for small-to-medium trade operations — roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, carpentry, landscaping, concrete, and more. Quotes are typically returned within 15 minutes. Certificates of insurance issued same-day upon binding.

Workers' compensation insurance is mandatory for most Arizona employers with one or more employees. The Arizona Industrial Commission enforces compliance and can issue stop-work orders for uninsured businesses. Contractors Choice Agency navigates the compliance requirements, EMR ratings, and carrier selection to get the right coverage at the right price.

## Services

- **Workers Comp Insurance Quotes** — Fast quotes for all contractor trades; AZ Industrial Commission compliant; EMR management guidance available
- **Certificate of Insurance** — Same-day COI issuance upon binding; naming additional insureds for GC requirements
- **Multi-state Coverage** — Arizona-based agency licensed in all 50 states; coverage available nationwide

## Who We Serve

Roofing contractors, HVAC technicians, plumbers, electricians, carpenters, landscapers, concrete workers, painters, drywall contractors, tile setters, and all specialty trade businesses.
